raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "High-speed rail creates middle-class opportunities and demonstrates true climate leadership by putting thousands of skilled tradespeople to work.",
    "The transformative high-speed rail project has already created over 15,000 high-quality jobs.",
    "The high-speed rail project will prevent over 142 million metric tons of carbon dioxide emissions.",
    "The economic impact of the high-speed rail project has generated over $22 billion, primarily benefiting communities in California's Central Valley.",
    "High-speed rail will connect the Central Valley to population centers and innovation hubs by 2038 to 2039.",
    "High-speed rail is positioned to serve as a catalyst for economic growth and long-term investment along its corridor.",
    "California High-Speed Rail is a key element in California's ongoing efforts to reduce emissions and meet climate goals.",
    "High-speed rail will create an efficient, sustainable alternative to both air and automobile travel between California's major cities.",
    "High-speed rail will provide major economic benefits by increasing economic integration among California's major metropolitan areas.",
    "The Cap-and-Trade Program revenues are integral to the progress of the high-speed rail project.",
    "High-speed rail is expected to build a cleaner, more connected California while creating thousands of union jobs.",
    "California has the opportunity to complete America's first solar powered high-speed rail system."
  ]
}
